findings.summary: VNA RF output chain with ADRF5042 SP4T switch, ADRF5730 digital attenuator, MAAM-011109 amplifiers, LTC5596 power detector. RF chain detection completely fails due to narrow keyword lists.

incorrect.description: SMA connectors treated as antennas by rf_matching detector -- SMA in RF test equipment are signal I/O ports, not antennas

missed.description: RF chain with 7+ components (ADRF5042, ADRF5730, MAAM-011109 x2, ATS2012, LTC5596, FPC07181) returns empty rf_chains -- keywords miss ADRF/ADMV/MAAM families
No attenuator category in RF chain detection -- ATS2012, ADRF5730, HMC424 are common RF attenuators with no detection category
Component ki_description field not extracted from lib_symbols -- contains text like 'Wideband Amplifier 10 MHz - 40 GHz' that could enable description-based RF classification
PLL loop filter not detected -- R/C networks on LMX2592/LMX2820 CPout pins form classic passive loop filters detected only as individual rc_filters

suggestions: Extract ki_description from lib_symbols for classification
Add ADRF, ADMV, MAAM, HMC3xx to RF keyword lists
SMA connectors should require ANT/AE ref prefix or antenna keyword to be treated as antennas
